title: Quiz: Simon's Algorithm
description: Test your understanding of Simon's algorithm

questions.question: Simon's algorithm provides what type of speedup?
questions.explanation: Simon's provides exponential speedup: O(n) vs O(2^(n/2)).

questions.question: In Simon's problem, f(x) = f(y) if and only if:
questions.explanation: The hidden period s satisfies f(x) = f(x⊕s) for all x.

questions.question: Simon's algorithm directly inspired Shor's factoring algorithm.
questions.explanation: Both use period-finding with quantum parallelism and classical post-processing.

questions.question: How many quantum measurements are needed in Simon's algorithm?
questions.explanation: Need O(n) measurements to get enough equations to solve for s.
